title: Customer
description: A registered customer account in Adobe Commerce.

group_id.description: ID of the customer group this customer belongs to.

email.description: Customer email address, used as the login identifier.

store_id.description: ID of the store view where this customer account was created.

website_id.description: ID of the website scope for this customer account.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the customer account was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the customer account was last updated.

custom_attributes.description: Custom EAV attribute values for this customer.
